de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class Junctor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Junctor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, Sorted

    public final class Junctor
extends AbstractSortedOperator
    Class of junctor operators, i.e., operators connecting a given number of formula to create another formula. There are six such operators: true, false, conjunction, disjunction, negation, and implication.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static Junctor AND
      the usual 'and' operator '/\' (be A, B formulae then 'A /\ B' is true if and only if A is true and B is true
      static Junctor FALSE
      the false constant
      static Junctor IMP
      the usual 'implication' operator '->' (be A, B formulae then 'A -> B' is true if and only if A is false or B is true
      static Junctor NOT
      the usual 'negation' operator '-'
      static Junctor OR
      the usual 'or' operator '\/' (be A, B formulae then 'A \/ B' is true if and only if A is true or B is true
      static Junctor TRUE
      the true constant

      • TRUE

      • FALSE

        public static final Junctor FALSE

      • AND

        public static final Junctor AND
        the usual 'and' operator '/\' (be A, B formulae then 'A /\ B' is true if and only if A is true and B is true

      • OR

        public static final Junctor OR
        the usual 'or' operator '\/' (be A, B formulae then 'A \/ B' is true if and only if A is true or B is true

      • NOT

        public static final Junctor NOT
        the usual 'negation' operator '-'

      • IMP

        public static final Junctor IMP
        the usual 'implication' operator '->' (be A, B formulae then 'A -> B' is true if and only if A is false or B is true
